 {"id":"bd-f282","title":"Test npm package installation locally","description":"Verify npm package works before publishing:

## Local testing
- Run npm pack in npm/ directory
- Install tarball globally: npm install -g beads-bd-0.21.5.tgz
- Test basic commands:
  - bd --version
  - bd init --quiet --prefix test
  - bd create "Test issue" -p 1 --json
  - bd list --json
  - bd sync

## Test environments
- macOS (darwin-arm64 and darwin-amd64)
- Linux (ubuntu docker container for linux-amd64)
- Windows (optional, if available)

## Validation
- Binary downloads during postinstall
- All bd commands work identically to native
- No permission issues
- Proper error messages on failure","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:40:05.71835-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-03T10:31:45.382577-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-03T10:31:45.382577-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-f282","depends_on_id":"bd-febc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:40:32.968748-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
